title: Multiagent Continual Coordination via Progressive Task Contextualization

method.problem: Limitations of mainstream cooperative MARL methods that assume agents have access to data from all tasks simultaneously
method.approach: Continual Reinforcement Learning to avoid catastrophic forgetting while enabling knowledge transfer

components.name: multi-agent task context extraction module
components.mechanism: product-of-expert (POE) mechanism to extract and integrate information into a latent space

components.name: contrastive regularizer
components.purpose: optimize learned representation by pulling similar tasks together and pushing dissimilar ones apart

components.name: expandable multi-head policy architecture
components.description: separate independent heads that are synchronously expanded with newly instantiated contexts

components.name: policy distillation
components.purpose: approximate policy head selection process using local information of each agent in centralized training
